ideation: This sequence depicts a woman facepalming, a gesture expressing exasperation, frustration, or embarrassment. The animation will focus on the right arm moving to cover the face, starting from a neutral position and ending with the hand resting on the forehead. The left arm will remain relatively still to highlight the action of the right arm. In the first frame, both arms start in a relaxed position at the sides. The second frame shows the right arm beginning to move upward, with the wrist slightly rotated inward to prepare for covering the face. The third frame depicts the right arm fully covering the face, with the palm resting on the forehead. The fourth frame shows the right arm slightly adjusting its position to maintain the facepalm pose, and the fifth frame shows the hand returning to a relaxed state, with the arm slightly lowered.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm begins to lift, hand turning inward
right hand slams onto the forehead in exasperation
a slight shift, the weight of the frustration settling
right arm lowers, the moment of despair passes
